Bash(python3 - <<'EOF'
with open\('/Users/apple/Downloads/index.html', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find style block
style_start = content.index\('<style>'\) + len\('<style>'\)
style_end = content.index\('</style>'\)
css = content[style_start:style_end].strip\(\)

# Find script block
script_start = content.index\('<script>'\) + len\('<script>'\)
script_end = content.rindex\('</script>'\)
js = content[script_start:script_end].strip\(\)

# HTML: everything in body between style/script
print\(f"CSS length: {len\(css\)} chars"\)
print\(f"JS length: {len\(js\)} chars"\)
print\(f"Total HTML: {len\(content\)} chars"\)

# Check for sampleJobs or hardcoded data
import re
sample_jobs_match = re.search\(r'\(const|let|var\)\\s+sample', js\)
print\(f"Has sampleJobs: {sample_jobs_match}"\)

# Show first 200 chars of js to understand structure
print\("\\n--- JS START ---"\)
print\(js[:500]\)
print\("\\n--- JS END ---"\)
print\(js[-200:]\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 - <<'EOF'
with open\('/Users/apple/Downloads/index.html', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract body content \(between <body> and </body>, minus the script block\)
body_start = content.index\('<body>'\) + len\('<body>'\)
body_end = content.rindex\('</body>'\)
body = content[body_start:body_end]

# Remove the script block from body
script_start = body.index\('<script>'\)
script_end = body.rindex\('</script>'\) + len\('</script>'\)
html_body = \(body[:script_start] + body[script_end:]\).strip\(\)

print\(html_body\)
EOF)
